Video.summary: Hiram & Julissa are about to get married and are looking for a larger home for their merging step-family. They’re about to see three amazing properties in Orange County, California.
Video.title: Moving to California

Video.summary: Steve and Yazmin are retired Los Angelenos looking for a luxury property further south in Orange County. They’re about to see three properties in Yorba Linda, Villa Park and Santa Ana.
Video.title: Orange County Adventure

Video.summary: Cyndi and David are East Coast millionaires looking to taste the West Coast lifestyle. They will see three fabulous homes in Yorba Linda in Orange County. One of them is a 6-bedroom home with a 100-foot waterslide!
Video.title: West Coast Good Life

Video.summary: Carol is a salon owner who is looking to relocate with her husband and expand her business to Southern California and have plenty of room for the grandkids. She’s about to see three properties in Pacific Palisades.
Video.title: Pacific Palisades

Video.summary: Glen and Giovanna return to Calabasas, determined to secure their ideal home in an enclave of luxury and privacy. Will they finally find their home in Calabasas?
Video.title: Calabasas Revisited

Video.summary: We meet million-dollar house hunters Erika & Sonny. They just moved from Chicago and are looking for the perfect Orange County home for their family. Will these Chicago transplants find the perfect West Coast home?
Video.title: Orange County Luxury

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Arsi & Madeleine tour three luxury properties in Playa Vista, CA.
Video.title: Playa Vista Luxury

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Kyle and Jess tour three luxury properties in Orange County, CA.
Video.title: Loving Laguna

Video.summary: Steven is looking for a place to spend his weekends that will accommodate his love of Motor Sports. Viviana is taking him through some of the most desirable properties in this one of kind Motor Sports Country Club.
Video.title: Thermal

Video.summary: We meet Alysia, an attorney looking to escape the cold wet weather of Seattle for the desert sunshine of Palm Springs. She’s about to see three luxury properties in La Quinta, California.
Video.title: Palm Springs Sunshine

Video.summary: Doug and Nicole are searching for a new luxury home in Los Angeles, California. They need a house that’s closer to their clients. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles

Image.alt: Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles
Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles
Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles

Video.summary: Today, meet Fleet Easton, he is the Crown Prince of Palm Springs. He’s a singer & dancer who has worked hard and is now ready to buy his dream home. Watch the process and see which one of these desert dwellings will seal the deal.
Video.title: Desert Luxury

Video.summary: We meet John and Laura, a couple who are in search of a luxury home. Viviana takes them through some of the most beautiful mega mansions in Montecito, California.
Video.title: Montecito

Video.summary: Kristi and Beth are a mother-daughter duo from Anaheim who are on the hunt for an amazing waterfront property. Will Kristi and Beth find the beachfront property of their dreams, or will they go pound sand?
Video.title: OC Water Front

Video.summary: We meet husband and wife duo, Leanne & Michael. They are looking for a coastal home in Orange County, California now that their children have grown. Which one of these seaside sanctuaries will be the one?
Video.title: A House by the Sea

Video.summary: Today on Million Dollar Dream Home, we meet Kathleen, a big time Hollywood producer who is looking to make the move to Beverly Hills, looking at luxury properties in the 90210.
Video.title: Beverly Hills Luxury

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Alex & Rose tour three luxury properties in Orange County, CA.
Video.title: OC House Hunt

Video.summary: We meet Bobbi Jo & Carmen. They are looking for a million-dollar home to be closer to work and upgrade to the home of their dreams. Which one of these million-dollar homes will be the one?
Video.title: Hollywood Hills

Video.summary: Steve and Natalie are east-coast transplants looking for the quintessential California lifestyle. We’re about to see three amazing properties in Manhattan Beach and Redondo Beach.
Video.title: Quintessential California Life

Video.summary: Tulika and Joe immerse themselves in the eclectic and artistic community of Venice, CA, seeking a million-dollar house that reflects their vibrant lifestyle.
Video.title: Venice Vibes

Video.summary: Kristina and Moe embark on an enchanting journey through Encino, CA, in search of an elegant and spacious million-dollar home.
Video.title: Encino Enchantment

Video.summary: Today, we meet million dollar house hunters Patrick and Pol. Stay tuned! They have three luxury properties to check out on this Million Dollar Malibu House Hunt. From modern to traditional, will these homes tick the right boxes?
Video.title: Malibu Magic

Video.summary: We meet newlyweds Cynthia and Doug. They are looking to move out of their modern home and into something more traditional. They’re about to see three luxury properties around Los Angeles. A big kitchen and a tennis court is a must.
Video.title: Newlyweds Abode

Video.summary: We meet married couple Henri and Chris who are in search of a luxury desert home. They need a house with the modern conveniences and a house to entertain at.
Video.title: Palm Springs

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Peter and Nathalie tour three luxury properties in Venice, CA.
Video.title: Venturing to Venice

Video.summary: We meet Ziba, a stay-at-home enterpriser. She is looking for the perfect home for her and her husband. They see a beautiful modern home in Luxury Bel Air with stunning views and all the bells and whistles.
Video.title: Bel Air Sophistication

Video.summary: We meet million dollar house hunters, Gus and Matthew. Gus is looking to move from the hustle and bustle of West Hollywood. They’re about to see three prime Pacific Palisades properties.
Video.title: Escape West Hollywood

Video.summary: Million dollar house hunter Veletta is looking to trade in East Coast living for the warmth of Southern California. She’s about to see three luxurious properties in Calabasas, CA.
Video.title: Calabasas Dreaming

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Lulu & Dave tour three luxury properties in Palm Springs, CA.
Video.title: Palm Springs Paradise

Video.summary: We meet sweethearts Jon and Lily moving in together. He needs room for his instruments and she wants a big kitchen. They're about to see three amazing properties in Beverly Hills. Will they be able to find their 90210 dream home?
Video.title: 90210 Dream Home

Video.summary: Best Friends, Siri And Marie tour three luxury properties in Pacific Palisades, CA.
Video.title: Californian Dreaming

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Lizzie and Martin tour three luxury properties in Manhattan and Redondo Beach.
Video.title: Beach House Hunt

Video.summary: John is ready to trade up Bay Area living for the beach. He’s about to see three amazing properties in Orange County, CA.
Video.title: Heading To the Beach
